raw_consumer_statement:
My wife and I have a Citi Credit Card. We have had the card for XXXX  years without any issue. Just recently ( XX/XX/year> ) our Citi Credit Card was compromised. There were XXXX purchases at XXXX which totaled {$2900.00} We reported the fraud immediately ( XX/XX/year> ) and had a new card sent to us from Citi. We also filed a police report on XX/XX/year>. 

We have tried to work with Citi customer service and Citi Fraud department ( answered all questions, provided police report ) since XX/XX/year> and as of today XX/XX/year> Citi is refusing to refund the fraud charges. These charges were not executed or approved by my wife and I. The Citi company website states, Citi has a Zero Liability Protection policy. 

We have followed all direction given by Citi and have worked with them for a month and they are now telling us ( as of today XX/XX/year> ) there is nothing they can do and they will not reverse or refund the fraud charges.
